arts.ttl: Ambitious claim Nottingham Forest player keen on move to specific club – Feels weighted with bias
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Galatasaray are showing interest in Nottingham Forest defender Ola Aina. The Super Lig side wanted to sign an experienced right back during the last window following the departure of Serge Aurier, but could only bring in Danish youngster Elias Jelert. arts.ttl: ‘Win the league? It feels possible’: Nottingham Forest fans dare to dream
arts.sum: European football seems attainable as one of England’s oldest clubs enjoys its moment ahead of Liverpool clash In a gleaming barber’s shop in the shadow of Nottingham Forest’s City Ground, Feras Al-Youssef is snipping his client’s hair with lightning efficiency, the clippings flying like silver filings to the floor. “We are going to win the league,” states the Aleppo-born adopted son of the city, lifting his eyes to a signed club shirt on the wall. Then he smiles. “Well, we hope – when this city is in a good mood, there is nothing like it.” Continue reading...
